LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WARREN SIMMONS, NANCY SIMMONS AND ESTATE OF WARREN L. SIMMONS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 TO BE HEARD ON JANUARY 28, 2013 AT 9:30 AM. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501, WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 7, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. DEFENDANTS SHALL FILE AND SERVE THEIR ANSWER WITHIN FOURTEEN (14) DAYS. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE FILED CONCURRENTLY WITH THE DEMURRER IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nhan T. Vu (213-955-8024) of Willenken Wilson Loh & Delgado for Warren L. Simmons Scotter, defendant and moving party / Robert W. Biederman (415-421-3400) of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith for Chevy's Assoicates, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs WARREN SIMMONS, NANCY SIMMONS, ESTATE OF WARREN L. SIMMONS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Materiality of alterations is a material fact. Defendants shall file and serve their answer within fourteen (14) days.
Defendant argues re the Motion to Strike that was filed concurrently with the Demurrer. Court denies the motion to strike. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Continued To Jan-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS WARREN SIMMONS, NANCY SIMMONS and ESTATE OF WARREN L. SIMMONS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - Transferred to Department 501 to be heard on January 28, 2013 at 9:30 am. Moving party is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date, no later than January 7, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077= (302/MJM)
